hero.title: EVA — Between Worlds
hero.subtitle: A journey through words and the stars
hero.quote: What is essential is invisible to the eye.
hero.lead: This journey begins by reading with your heart. Join the Little Prince from planet to planet and strengthen your reading comprehension.

modulesSection.title: Seven Planets to Discover
modulesSection.subtitle: Each planet tells a new story. Choose one to begin exploring.

foxSection.title: The Fox Is With You
foxSection.quote: You become responsible, forever, for what you have tamed.
foxSection.body: In every activity, the fox narrator will give you clues, words of encouragement, and questions to help you think without writing the answer for you. Read carefully: what is essential is seen with the heart.

footer.tagline: A literary journey inspired by The Little Prince.
footer.rights: Made with care among the stars.

map.title: EVA's Solar System
map.subtitle: Each planet hides a different story. Which one shall we visit today?

bienvenida.title: Welcome: Begin the Adventure
bienvenida.narration: "That was how I made the acquaintance of the little prince." The fox is waiting to begin the journey.
bienvenida.scene: A small airfield in the desert at sunset, with the pilot's airplane under repair.

cards.title: Welcome to EVA — Between Worlds
cards.desc: Meet your guide and get ready for takeoff.

cards.title: Initial Assessment
cards.desc: A short questionnaire about your reading interests.

modulo-2-el-principito.title: The World of The Little Prince
modulo-2-el-principito.narration: "Then I had a second reason to admire the little prince." We are landing on his home.
modulo-2-el-principito.scene: The tiny asteroid B-612 with its volcano, the miniature baobab, and the rose beneath its glass globe.

cards.title: History of The Little Prince
cards.desc: Read the story of the book, slide by slide.

cards.title: Interactive Graphic Novel
cards.desc: A story to see and feel, panel by panel.

cards.title: Reading Comprehension
cards.desc: What do you remember about Asteroid B-612?

cards.title: Explore the Asteroid
cards.desc: Discover the volcano, the baobab, and the rose.

cards.title: Reflection Question
cards.desc: Think about your own rose.

cards.title: Fox Chapter Questions
cards.desc: Explore the key chapter episode with the fox.

modulo-3-conceptos.title: Concepts: Discover Literature
modulo-3-conceptos.narration: "Here, every book is a different star." Welcome to the Planet of Books.
modulo-3-conceptos.scene: A planet covered with bookshelves and floating books, illuminated by glowing lampposts.

cards.title: What Is Literature?
cards.desc: The art of telling stories with words.

cards.title: Classification
cards.desc: Sort the literary stars.

modulo-4-glosario.title: Interactive Visual Glossary
modulo-4-glosario.narration: "Words, like roses, must also be watered so they can grow."
modulo-4-glosario.scene: A garden filled with colorful flowers, where every flower represents a new word.

cards.title: Glossary
cards.desc: The garden of new words.

cards.title: Match the Words
cards.desc: Match each word to its flower.

cards.title: Creative Writing
cards.desc: Plant your own words.

cards.title: Find The Little Prince's Words
cards.desc: A stellar word search.

modulo-5-retos.title: Challenge Center: Literary Adventures
modulo-5-retos.narration: "All the stars are softly lit, as if they were shining just for me."
modulo-5-retos.scene: A floating space station surrounded by constellations, each representing a challenge.

cards.title: Interactive Game
cards.desc: The Race Across the Six Planets.

cards.title: Reading Quiz
cards.desc: Put your reading compass to the test.

modulo-6-proyecto.title: Creative Project: Your Own Story
modulo-6-proyecto.narration: "Draw me a planet." Now it's your turn to create one.
modulo-6-proyecto.scene: A planet that students will gradually color and populate with their creative project.

cards.title: Project Guide
cards.desc: How to build your own planet of stories.

cards.title: My Planet, My Story
cards.desc: Combine text, drawings, and audio.

modulo-7-cierre.title: Closing: Final Reflection
modulo-7-cierre.narration: "Look at the stars. Somewhere among them, I shall be laughing."
modulo-7-cierre.scene: The desert at sunrise, with the Little Prince walking back toward the stars.

cards.title: Final Assessment
cards.desc: The great journey: your growth as a reader.

cards.title: Reflection
cards.desc: What I take away from this journey.

cards.title: Planet Gallery
cards.desc: Explore your classmates' planets.
